title: Progression+
description: Mod that adds an upgrade system for player attributes like: health, damage, speed, mining speed.
body:
![banner](https://github.com/vitaliy65/FABRIC-progression_plus-1.21.5/blob/master/src/main/resources/assets/progression-plus/Progression-banner.png?raw=true)


Gui was taken from the “Heart of the Universe” season on the channel [MrLololoshka](https://www.youtube.com/@MrLololoshka) Upgrade your character and become stronger! Progression Plus is a lightweight Fabric mod for Minecraft 1.21.5 that adds configurable, passive player stat upgrades—like strength, resistance, and mining speed—that scale with progression for enhanced long-term gameplay.


- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) - [Cardinal Components API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cardinal-components-api)




![gui_eng.png](https://github.com/vitaliy65/FABRIC-progression_plus-1.21.5/blob/master/src/main/resources/assets/progression-plus/gui_eng.png?raw=true) ![exp_counter.png](https://github.com/vitaliy65/FABRIC-progression_plus-1.21.5/blob/master/src/main/resources/assets/progression-plus/exp_counter_eng.png?raw=true)


This mod is developed for Fabric. There are no plans to develop a Forge version. Modpack Permission: - Feel free to use it in any modpacks. Bug Report: - Just report bugs at the github page.
